'''balada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miauling|miauling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miauling|miauling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| balada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bælædæth|bælædæth]] || [[word:bælædæj|bælædæj]] || [[word:bælædæsh|bælædæsh]] || [[word:bælædæ|bælædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:balaladath|balaladath]] || [[word:balaladaj|balaladaj]] || [[word:balaladash|balaladash]] || [[word:balalada|balalada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:baladath|baladath]] || [[word:baladaj|baladaj]] || [[word:baladash|baladash]] || [[word:balada|balada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:balafdath|balafdath]] || [[word:balafdaj|balafdaj]] || [[word:balafdash|balafdash]] || [[word:balafdaf|balafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:baladatha|baladatha]] || [[word:baladaja|baladaja]] || [[word:baladasha|baladasha]] || [[word:baladaka|baladaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:baladath|baladath]] || [[word:baladaj|baladaj]] || [[word:baladash|baladash]] || [[word:balada|balada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:baladathal|baladathal]] || [[word:baladajal|baladajal]] || [[word:baladashal|baladashal]] || [[word:baladakal|baladakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:baladathatha|baladathatha]] || [[word:baladajaja|baladajaja]] || [[word:baladashasha|baladashasha]] || [[word:baladaka|baladaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:baladathan|baladathan]] || [[word:baladajan|baladajan]] || [[word:baladashan|baladashan]] || [[word:baladakan|baladakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:baladathaoro|baladathaoro]] || [[word:baladajaoro|baladajaoro]] || [[word:baladashaoro|baladashaoro]] || [[word:baladakaoro|baladakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
